name: noti
description: Telegram alerts when Claude finishes or needs permission, plus answer-from-phone via ask_user. Rewritten as a single static Go binary (v2). No Python or external dependencies required at runtime.

bot_token.title: Telegram Bot Token
bot_token.description: Optional. The source of truth is ~/.config/noti/config.json (written by /noti:setup); this is only a fallback env var for notify.sh when the broker is down.

chat_id.title: Your Telegram Chat ID
chat_id.description: Optional fallback. /noti:setup stores your chat id in ~/.config/noti/config.json.
